title: Hemionitis austrotenuifolia
taxonomy: Hemionitis austrotenuifolia is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is native to Australia, specifically in the southeastern regions. The classification of Hemionitis austrotenuifolia is part of the larger grouping of the Polypodiophyta division. It belongs to the genus Hemionitis, which is a group of ferns that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Hemionitis austrotenuifolia is further detailed by its scientific name, which follows the binomial nomenclature system.
